tasks.title: Audit SINC Authentication Middleware
tasks.description: Analyze app/Http/Middleware for potential bypasses or logic errors.

metadata.findings: No major flaws found. Middleware correctly resolves tenant_id from request context.
metadata.status_reason: Audit complete. Verified app/Http/Middleware/CheckPlanLimits.php handles multi-tenancy correctly.
